scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n runner,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @opviz/runner" "npm run dev -w @opviz/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @opviz/runner && npm run build -w @opviz/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n runner,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w @opviz/runner" "npm run start -w @opviz/web"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start
